comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://adguard.com/ko/welcome.html](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fadguard.com%2Fko%2Fwelcome.html) ### Comment > Since yesterday, enabling AdGuard has caused all internet connectivity to stop working. I tried disabling each of the four protections individually — ad blocking, tracking protection, DNS protection, and the firewall — and also turned them all off at the same time, but the internet remains unavailable whenever AdGuard is turned on. This affects not only Chrome but also messaging apps, which are unable to send messages due to the loss of internet connection. The issue persists after multiple updates, which is why I am submitting this error report. ### Screenshots

issue.title: www.showcamrips.com

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

issue.title: www.oricon.co.jp

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

<details>
<summary>Detailed description for iOS users</summary>

1. Install [**Usercripts**](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/userscripts/id1463298887) app
2. Enable **Usercripts** extension in Safari settings
	* iOS 18+: `System settings` => `Apps` => `Safari` => `Extensions`
	* iOS 17 and older: `System settings` => `Safari` => `Extensions`
	Find **Usercripts**, enable it and allow `On other sites` permission
4. Open the [tinyShield ](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@filteringdev/tinyshield@latest/dist/tinyShield.user.js) userscript URL in browser
5. Press the extensions icon in the address bar of Safari and select Userscripts 
6. Tap to install
7. In opened popup, scroll down and press Install button
8. Done.

</details>

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

comment.body:
Happens on Android 15, on Windows 11 i have no issues.
It is related to these links:
||1.fb.html-load.com^$important
||2.fb.html-load.com^$important
||3.fb.html-load.com^$important
||4.fb.html-load.com^$important
||5.fb.html-load.com^$important
||6.fb.html-load.com^$important
||7.fb.html-load.com^$important
||8.fb.html-load.com^$important
||9.fb.html-load.com^$important
||10.fb.html-load.com^$important

If i unblock these, i get no warnings to disable adguard/adblock and the website works as expected (sort of, i get a lot of annoying ads).
Here's the error message:

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/7c36316e-c92a-4b93-9a2e-0e6a1094664a)

Running latest adguard home (free) docker image on 2 different raspberry pi's (4 & 5).

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [NSFW] [https://www.showcamrips.com/show-cam-sex-movies/1945208-sexxxsirens-chaturbate-webcam-rip-20260404-112427.html](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.showcamrips.com%2Fshow-cam-sex-movies%2F1945208-sexxxsirens-chaturbate-webcam-rip-20260404-112427.html) ### Comment > Breakage: video doesn't play after clicking play button. > > Occurs on Firefox only for me (doesn't occur on Chrome). > > This filter from `AdGuard - Ads` (for uBO) breaks video in uBO: `showcamrips.com##+js(remove-node-text, script, /ads-|popunder|ads_|moiads|SetFirstPop/)`. As a proof - adding an exception `#@#` to this filter fixes the breakage. ``` Username: @felix-22 ``` ### [NSFW] Screenshots [Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/k44885q57fkkko0ksoko0wgwk4ws4wozkfwdko2eis.png?nc=1) [Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/eo0up9k5nd44g484c0go0wgwsw48kccerlowafhg1w.png?nc=1) ### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| Platform: | uBlock Origin v1.70.0 System version: | `Win` Browser: | Firefox Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**

As a proof - adding an exception `#@#` to this filter fixes the breakage. ``` Username: @felix-22 ``` ### [NSFW] Screenshots [Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/k44885q57fkkko0ksoko0wgwk4ws4wozkfwdko2eis.png?nc=1) [Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/eo0up9k5nd44g484c0go0wgwsw48kccerlowafhg1w.png?nc=1) ### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| Platform: | uBlock Origin v1.70.0 System version: | `Win` Browser: | Firefox Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [http://backup.c-o-d.net](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=http%3A%2F%2Fbackup.c-o-d.net) ### Comment > Здравствуйте! Я столкнулся с проблемой, что на Android не удается установить соединение с сервером FTP. На этапе получения списка файлов происходит ошибка. Есть предположение, что проблема с подменой IP-адресов, которую выполняет AdGuard. Что я делаю: > 1. В AdGuard я настроил использование прокси-сервера (дополнительно для FTP-клиента я отключал использование прокси, но это не помогло) > 2. В FTP-клиенте FX Explorer (дополнительно пробовал AirExplorer) пытаюсь подключиться к серверу FTP в Интернете > 3. Получаю ошибку, что не удается установить соединение с сервером. > Насколько я знаю принципы работы протокола FTP и судя по логам AdGuard, можно сделать вывод, что не удается клиенту установить транспортное соединение, через которое клиент пытается получить список файлов/скачать файл/загрузить файл. Основное соединение работает, а вспомогательное - нет ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/3j1mbpzuk604c0ocockw04skw4wgswsiygzkri94c8.jpg?nc=1)
Screenshot 2 ![Screenshot 2](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/3epyo9td40w0sgo48c8ks08k0w0oo4w4t0rbfr0k0s.jpg?nc=1)
Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/7dtgbp8c8qcc8kwog8wck4404kk4gc435cg7793188.jpg?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard for Android v4.12.3 System version: | `Android 14` Browser: | nextapp.fx (FX Explorer) License type: | paid Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
AdGuard Base filter,
AdGuard Mobile Ads filter

**Privacy:**
AdGuard Tracking Protection filter,
AdGuard URL Tracking filter,
EasyPrivacy

**Social Widgets:**
AdGuard Social Media filter AdGuard mode: | VPN HTTPS filtering: | enabled Android system root: | no Tracking protection: | **General**:
Block trackers,
Strip URLs from tracking parameters,
Send Do-Not-Track header DNS filtering: | disabled Browsing Security: | enabled Browsing Security statistics: | disabled Userscripts: | disabled Userstyles: | disabled Other extensions used: | `Trend Micro, Happ` ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.com/settings/import.html?product_type=and&product_version=4.12.3&system_version=Android+14&browser=other&browser_detail=nextapp.fx+%28FX+Explorer%29&filters=2.11.3.17.118.4&android.mode=VPN&android.system_root=false&dns.enabled=false&https.filtering=true&browsing_security.enabled=true&browsing_security.statistics_enabled=false&stealth.enabled=true&stealth.strip_url=true&stealth.DNT=true&stealth.block_trackers=true&license_type=paid)
